title: Tactical Aid
description: Using injectors to make Vanilla's potion more useful.
body:
This mod has added several vanilla based injectors.

Curios API is required!!!

Purpose: 1. It is more convenient and efficient to obtain potion effects in battles.
                 2. Make the vanilla potion more important.
                 3. Will not affect other entities like splashed potions.
                 4.Include a food storage to store food without occupying backpack space.

Press "B" to open injector harness,press "J" to open food storage.(only when enquiped)

JEI is recommended for recipes.
Used in modpacks or videos is allowed.
